title: TriggerReport
description: The result of installing a currency trigger — what was touched + the marker, so re-install is idempotent (the marker is a managed sentinel block in the config edit, NEVER in skill bytes).

marker_id.description: `topos` + harness id + schema version + command identity.

touched_path.description: The config file edited (never a skill dir).

CurrencyKind.description: What fires currency for a harness — drives HONEST receipt copy ("current by next session", "next topos touch", …). `ExplicitPullOnly` is the honest-degrade floor.

oneOf.description: An equivalent command exists without our marker — adopt-or-leave, never blind-append.
